job_text: Looking for machine learning engineer with python pytorch sql and cloud experience. Must have project ownership and teamwork skills.
Data scientist role requiring python pandas scikit-learn statistics and communication skills. Bachelor or master degree preferred. 2+ years experience.
Backend software engineer with python fastapi sql docker kubernetes. 3+ years experience in building microservices and leading delivery teams.
NLP researcher with python transformers pytorch huggingface and academic publication record. PhD or equivalent experience in deep learning and language models.
Data engineer skilled in python spark sql airflow cloud pipelines. Strong project ownership and stakeholder communication required.
